title: Dungeon Landlord
pitch: You OWN the dungeon and rent its rooms to monsters — the only combat is the eviction fight.
howto: Dig rooms, move applicants in, and keep tenants happy with furnishings and the right neighbors. Happy tenants level up and pay more rent; neglected ones stop paying and rebel. Gold and reputation unlock deeper rooms and richer species — rent keeps piling up while you're away.
controls: Tap rooms to inspect, dig, furnish and collect rent. Tap an applicant, then a green room, to move them in. Evictions: tap the rebel to strike, tap SHIELD to block their shockwave.
